## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between Activeloop and fwd.digital for SEO and content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Activeloop seeks to scale awareness and increase revenue-attributed marketing, targeting more booked calls](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers end-to-end content strategy, production, and optimization services with AI-powered workflows and expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Technical complexity of Activeloop's product raises concerns about content creation and ranking potential](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Current SEO efforts at Activeloop have plateaued, prompting interest in fwd.digital's services](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Topics

### Activeloop's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Series A stage company with established ICP and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Focus on developer marketing, content-heavy approach (articles, courses, AI knowledge base)](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Main KPI: Revenue attributed to marketing](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Current challenge: Plateauing SEO performance and traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

### fwd.digital's Offering and Approach

  - [End-to-end content strategy, production, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Custom workflows for content creation, including research, drafting, editing, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Emphasis on building topical clusters and comprehensive content](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Continuous content refreshing and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Team of highly vetted editors and content specialists (0.02% hire rate)](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Technical SEO Concerns

  - [Activeloop has existing technical SEO issues (Core Web Vitals failures)](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Previous attempts to fix technical issues haven't yielded significant ranking improvements](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers technical SEO audit but doesn't handle web development](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)

### Content Strategy for Technical Products

  - [fwd.digital has experience with technical clients (e.g., Trappy, PromFu)](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Approach involves building custom knowledge bases and trusted sources](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Focus on answering user questions comprehensively, not necessarily creating novel insights](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

### Potential Partnership Considerations

  - [Activeloop's product complexity may require additional expertise](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [fwd.digital confident in improving content quality and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Success depends on systematic approach: content creation, optimization, link building, and domain authority improvement](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to add Mikayel to Slack channel for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Marcel to send meeting recording and content samples](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [fwd.digital to conduct technical SEO audit before potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Mikayel to review audit results and samples before making a decision on the 3-month pilot](https://fathom.video/share/n7QhWhCgpbF5ZRQJMgTz76PEdSAuQSTN?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
